series_metadata.series_description: Submitted bids with bonds and other related documents. Includes, but is not limited to, EDGE certifications, OSHA training and Drug Free Workplace registration certifications. Also, bid tabs, notices of award, subcontractor and materials lists, and all correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 15 years after project financial close. ; Electronic: 15 years after project financial close., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
